exceptions.justification: Transitive dependency via @anthropic-ai/sdk -> @types/node-fetch -> form-data@4.0.5. fixAvailable requires an upstream SDK bump or npm override. The affected code path (multipart field names/filenames CRLF injection) is not exercised by GitWire's server-side use of the Anthropic SDK. Time-bounded to force re-evaluation.
Transitive dependency via micromatch. Time-bounded exception pending upstream remediation or dependency update.
Transitive dependency used by configuration loaders. Time-bounded exception pending upstream remediation or dependency update.
